title: Valley of Humiliation
subtitle: Where the old master demands you back
intro: The road drops into a bruised valley, low enough for old shame to speak loudly.
Apollyon waits there with a ledger of your failures, hoping you will mistake accusation for truth.
Do not answer him with boasting. Answer him with the Cross, with prayer, and with a trembling stand that refuses to turn back.
spiritual_theme: Humility under accusation and victory through promised grace
core_mechanic: Face Apollyon's intimidation, shame, and assault; stand firm, pray for light, and answer every lie with promises until his claim breaks.
